title: Evangelion on NPR yo
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion on NPR, yo             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Jul 19, 2004 5:22 am http://www.npr.org/features/feature.php?wfId=3188015 http://www.npr.org/features/feature.php?wfId=1778628 One of them briefly mentions the live action movie, and has Matt Greenfield speaking and the other one is a review of the directors' cuts. Listen, they're good!

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Jul 19, 2004 12:04 pm Wow, the way NPR said everything gave Eva and the other anime respect. They didn't look down upon it or push it away. They just made it just right, except the interviews with the cosplayers made them sound a little geeky. And I wished they had metioned a few more titles.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Mon Jul 19, 2004 8:57 pm Wow! Good find! I enjoyed second one a lot.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 19, 2004 10:36 pm It won't work!!! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jul 19, 2004 10:42 pm On the second one, are those the voices they are using for the Platinum Edition? Kaworu sounded kinda fruity.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 20, 2004 1:10 am If you're refering to Greg Ayres... yes... he is a bit fruity.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Jul 20, 2004 5:59 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It won't work!!! :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 20, 2004 2:24 pm I'm on dial up.... it won't work. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Wed Jul 21, 2004 6:59 am I'm on dial up

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 22, 2004 2:38 am Karma Burn wrote: I'm on dial up

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 22, 2004 7:38 am Can anyone hook an Eva geek up, find a way to capture/save the audio and put it somewhere where it can be saved? My problem is that I can't stream media, but I can download stuff thats big. I just have to be patient.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 22, 2004 1:37 pm Um... if you tell me how I can get it into a wav or media player file I can upload it to a site where you can download it. All I seem to be able to do is create a link to the stream on my desktop. :(

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Thu Jul 22, 2004 3:30 pm I'll hook you up, Aaron.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:34 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: Karma Burn wrote: I'm on dial up

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:58 pm Yeah, kaworu sounds....

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 18, 2006 4:03 pm me no like greg aryes as kaworu. hes good at other roles just not as kaworu. I actually have an interview of him saying that kaworu was his best role and fav role too
